role: Minister of Petroleum (2007–2009); former managing director of NIOC
bio: Gholam-Hossein Nozari is an Iranian petroleum engineer and politician who served as Minister of Petroleum from 2007 to 2009 under [Mahmoud Ahmadinejad](/people/mahmoud-ahmadinejad). A career veteran of the National Iranian Oil Company (NIOC), he was appointed managing director of NIOC in March 2006 before succeeding [Kazem Vaziri Hamaneh](/people/kazem-vaziri-hamaneh) as oil minister in August 2007. He oversaw the [Ministry of Petroleum](/orgs/ministry-of-petroleum) during a period of volatile oil prices. In 2012 he was nominated as Secretary General of OPEC.
editorial_notes: Born 1954 in Kazerun. NIOC career man. MD of NIOC 2006. Oil Minister 2007-2009. Nominated OPEC SecGen 2012.
